/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/OrderService.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OrderService.dir/src/OrderController.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OrderService.dir/src/Order.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OrderService.dir/src/OrderService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OrderService.dir/src/OrderRepository.cpp.o -o OrderService  ../../common/libCommon.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsqlite3.so /workspaces/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libargon2.a /workspaces/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libssl.a /workspaces/vcpkg/installed/x64-linux/debug/lib/libcrypto.a -ldl
